TRIAL COMMENCED AND WAS COMPLETED IN LESS THAN THREE HOURS. THOMAS SHERIDAN IS FOR THE PLAINTIFF. JEFFREY LEON IS FOR THE DEFENDANT. MOTION FOR STATEMENT OF DECISION IS DENIED. COURT RENDERS JUDGMENT FOR THE PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST THE DEFENDANT FOR $47,302.98. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE THE JUDGMENT. COURT ORDERS AN OSC HEARING AS TO THE DEFENSE COUNSEL JEFFREY LEON ONLY AS TO WHY HE HAD NOT FILED A SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY FORM AND WHY HE WAS LATE FOR TODAY'S TRIAL TO BE HEARD ON NOVEMBER 27, 2012 AT 09:30AM IN DEPT #504. JUDGE KAY TSENIN, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT ON THE RECORD, DEPARTMENT #504
